title: Command-generation generic schema ownership

canonical_core.requested_outcome: Move or mirror generic command package schemas under command-generation ownership while AW keeps only AW-specific contracts and data.
canonical_core.hard_constraints: Keep command-generation as a maintainer dependency only; AW remains the owner of AW command meaning, generated outputs, and runtime-boundary policy.
canonical_core.agent_may_decide: Implementation order, helper names, and validation tightening inside this lane.
canonical_core.escalate_when: The lane needs command semantic drift, runtime dependency drift, or files outside the declared owner surfaces.
canonical_core.next_action: Inventory generic schemas, wire package-owned schema resolution, and leave explicit mirror/removal checks for temporary AW copies.
completion_criteria: Generic command package, operation, primitive, and conformance schemas have package-owned paths.
AW validation resolves generic schemas through explicit package APIs or paths.
Any remaining AW mirror has an equality check and removal path.

goal: Move or mirror generic command package schemas under command-generation ownership while AW keeps only AW-specific contracts and data.
non_goals: Do not move AW command data or AW operation contracts into command-generation.
Do not rewrite schema semantics broadly.

intent_continuity.this slice completes the larger intended: no, it completes one child lane

execution_bounds.required validation commands: uv run python scripts/generate/generate_command_packages.py --check; uv run python scripts/check/check_generated_command_packages.py --python-conformance; uv run pytest tests/test_command_generation_artifacts.py tests/test_command_generation_primitive_executor.py -q; uv --directory ../command-generation run pytest -q
execution_bounds.ask-before-refactor threshold: Ask before changing command semantics, generated package layout, runtime dependency policy, or unrelated package internals.
execution_bounds.stop before touching: Unrelated AW runtime behavior, unrelated package internals, or generated outputs not covered by freshness proof.
execution_bounds.max changed files: closed slice; no further writes expected without reopening a fresh plan.

Generated package proof remains the freshness and target-proof authority.
